p. 01
The best vision
is insight.
— Malcolm Forbes (1919–1990)
p. 02
About Forbes Global Properties
The world's finest homes and the stories behind them.

Forbes Global Properties is the exclusive worldwide real estate partner of Forbes, the world's most trusted media brand. Established in 2020, we are a network of exceptional brokerages who represent the buyers and sellers of the most prestigious properties across the world.

No other real estate platform has the same global reach or media power as Forbes. Forbes Global Properties engages an audience of discerning consumers, and presents the world's finest properties paired with trusted market coverage and insights from our industry leaders.

Primarily owned and run by top brokerage firms, with a Forbes ownership stake creating aligned interest in our success
Unique access to Forbes' digital ecosystem, reaching 167 million viewers worldwide every month
Properties presented on forbes.com and forbesglobalproperties.com with compelling editorial stories, films and photography
International network of elite professionals, with membership strictly by invitation

p. 05
The Forbes Mission
Around the world, Forbes is synonymous with success.

Supporting Forbes' mission to celebrate those who made it and champion those who aspire to make it, our perspective is unique.

We introduce discerning buyers, sellers and real estate aficionados to a curated collection of coveted properties, all presented within the context of timely market data, rich editorial and expert insights.

Buyers gain access to an exclusive selection of high-end properties, many not widely available on traditional listing platforms. Sellers benefit from Forbes' extensive earned media reach, positioning their properties in front of influential media outlets and top-tier publications.

Forbes Global Properties — Listed Properties
Luxury Villas
Waterfront Estates

p. 07
Part II — The South Africa Opportunity
South
Africa.
First Mover.
Forbes Global Properties South Africa represents one of the most strategically compelling untapped markets in the global luxury real estate network. Under the license held by Keegan Steyn, the operation positions investors at the ground floor of a network anchored by the world's most recognised media brand.
Why Now · Why Here
01
Untapped MarketSouth Africa's luxury real estate sector is underserved by globally recognised brands. First-mover advantage is available now.
02
Forbes LicenceExclusive license held by operating company under Keegan Steyn. Direct brand association with Forbes, the world's most trusted media name.
03
Structured Returns17% compounded annually. Single lump-sum exit. Defined term. No ambiguity in the exit mechanism.
p. 08
KS
Keegan Steyn
CEO & Founder · Forbes Global Properties South Africa
Leadership
Keegan
Steyn
CEO & Founder — Forbes Global Properties South Africa

Keegan brings deep expertise in the South African luxury property market, with established relationships across the country. His understanding of the premium residential sector, combined with his commitment to the Forbes standard of excellence, makes him uniquely positioned to lead this operation.

Keegan personally was identified, selected, and furthermore secured the Forbes Global Properties license in South Africa, representing a landmark achievement in bringing one of the world's most recognised real estate brands to the African continent.

"The best vision is insight. Bringing Forbes Global Properties to South Africa is not just a business decision, it is a legacy one."

Return Calculation

At the end of the six-year term, the company and/or founder will repurchase the preference shares for R6,412,500, representing 17% compounded annually on the original investment. No dividends are distributed during the investment period.

p. 12
The Business
Model

The business operates as a luxury real estate brokerage under the Forbes Global Properties license, controlled by Keegan Steyn. Agents are recruited, transactions are facilitated, and the Forbes brand lends immediate credibility in the premium segment.

Revenue scales directly with transaction volume. The 2.025% effective revenue rate means every rand of property sold generates predictable company income, with no complex product development or tech dependency.

Commission Architecture
Total Commission
4.5%
Agent Share
50%
Company Retains
45%
Strategic Partner
5%
2.025%
Effective Revenue Rate
Of total property transaction value flows as company revenue. At R1.5B in Year 6 sales, that equals R30.4M gross.
